_comment: Single source of truth for the guided-visualization narration. The app (sprints/goal-flow.tsx) builds the on-screen prompts from this, and scripts/generate-narration.mjs reads the same text to render /public/audio/{id}.mp3 via ElevenLabs. Editing a line's text means regenerating that clip (npm run narration). holdMs is the silent visualization pause AFTER the line is read aloud.

future.endText: Now open your eyes and fill out these boxes.

steps.text: Close your eyes. It is exactly one year from today. This is not a fantasy. This is your realistic best-case outcome if you consistently did the work.
Morning: What do you now do automatically that used to require effort?
Midday: A hard moment happens. How do you handle it differently than today?
Evening: What did you follow through on today that the old you would have avoided?
Freeze frame: What single moment best captures your transformation?

obstacle.endText: Now open your eyes and write the obstacle in one sentence.

steps.text: Now contrast that future with reality: What inside me is most likely to block it? Close your eyes and picture the exact moment it happens vividly.
The thought that will tempt me is...
The emotion that comes with it is...
The behavior it usually triggers is...
